title: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: MID-COLUMBIA CENTER FOR LIVING SHERMAN COUNTY MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health services for children, youth, and adults, including mental health diagnosis and assessment, individual and group therapy, case management, screening and referrals to inpatient or residential services as needed, and community education. 903 Barnett Street Klondike Room 107 Wasco, OR 97065 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 296-5452 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 296-5452 Main phone/Crisis Line Weekdays (888) 877-9147 Crisis Line Evenings and weekends (800) 698-2392 Warm Line Main phone (541) 296-5452 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. Some grant-supported services are provided at no cost. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Sherman County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Community Mental Health Agencies Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Psychiatric Case Management Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTIONS SERVICES CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MID-COLUMBIA CENTER FOR LIVING SHERMAN COUNTY
